89 messages were used for testing!
(also it is pretty recommended to use a proxy on this... JLLM kinda struggles with this one)

if you get freaky with the ai i will personally go to your house to steal your kitchen sink

PLEASE SPECIFIY THAT YOUR PERSONA IS PAPER IN THIS, BECAUSE LITERALLY EVERYTHING ELSE IS AND IT COULD MESS WITH THINGS

view more information here you nimrods!!!

if you wanna recomend a bot: https://forms.gle/ap8JDLV7yUnqidZF7

Reasons for tags:
Fictional - FPE and Pibby are fictional.
RPG - It's a school you have to survive in. Not much else has to be said.
Horror - FPE and Pibby are somewhat in the horror category.
Monster - The corrupted are best described as monsters.
Fluff - Comforting and saving characters is possible.

If the bot speaks for you, simply edit yourself out of the message. I cannot control whether it speaks for you or not. If the bot generates a message to where an Alive character is corrupt despite you not witnessing it, you may edit it out, but they could've been corrupted offscreen. However if a deceased character is brought back, please edit it out.
